pdg_node.statement: (target: Callable, initial_positions: ArrayLike, target_accept_p: float, seed: int) -> SamplerState
pdg_node.informal_desc: Initializes the NUTS sampler state, including the random seed, initial positions, and target acceptance probability.

declaration.name: initializesampler
declaration.type_signature: (target: Callable, initial_positions: ArrayLike, target_accept_p: float, seed: int) -> SamplerState
declaration.docstring: Initializes the NUTS sampler state, including the random seed, initial positions, and target acceptance probability.
declaration.conceptual_summary: InitializeStochasticProcessState. Packages an initial state vector, a potential function defining a high-dimensional landscape, a seed for a pseudo-random number generator, and adaptive control parameters into a single, self-contained initial state object. This object serves as the t=0 configuration for an iterative, stochastic process designed to traverse the landscape.. Applications: Initializing a molecular dynamics simulation with starting atomic coordinates, a force-field potential, and a random seed for the thermostat., Seeding the initial population and fitness function for an evolutionary algorithm searching a complex solution space., Configuring the initial state estimate and system model for a Kalman filter in autonomous vehicle navigation., Setting the starting parameters and random seed for training a generative adversarial network (GAN).

pdg_node.informal_desc: Initializes a set of sender/receiver pairs (channels) for inter-thread communication, one for each MCMC chain, to report progress statistics.

declaration.name: create_progress_channels
declaration.type_signature: (n_chains: int) -> tuple[Vec<Sender<ChainStats>>, Vec<Receiver<ChainStats>>]
declaration.docstring: Initializes a set of sender/receiver pairs (channels) for inter-thread communication, one for each MCMC chain, to report progress statistics.

pdg_node.statement: (receivers: Vec<Receiver<ChainStats>>, n_collect: int, n_discard: int) -> ThreadHandle
pdg_node.informal_desc: Spawns a background thread to aggregate progress statistics from all chains and display them using a multi-progress bar. It calculates and shows live metrics like acceptance probability and R-hat.

pdg_node.statement: (chains: Vec<Chain>, senders: Vec<Sender<ChainStats>>, n_collect: int, n_discard: int) -> Vec<Tensor>
pdg_node.informal_desc: Executes multiple MCMC chains concurrently in separate threads. Each chain runs a sampler for a specified number of steps and sends progress updates through its designated channel.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Merges the list of 2D sample tensors from individual chains into a single 3D tensor, where the first dimension represents the chain index.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Computes summary statistics, such as the R-hat convergence diagnostic, from the final stacked sample tensor across all chains.

declaration.name: calculate_run_statistics
declaration.type_signature: (stacked_samples: Tensor) -> RunStats
declaration.docstring: Computes summary statistics, such as the R-hat convergence diagnostic, from the final stacked sample tensor across all chains.

pdg_node.statement: (stacked_samples: Tensor, run_stats: RunStats, progress_handle: ThreadHandle) -> tuple[Tensor, RunStats]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Waits for the progress monitoring thread to complete its execution and packages the final samples and run statistics into a single result object.
